name: Careful Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you cast a spell that forces other creatures to make a saving throw, you can protect some of them. Choose up to your Charisma modifier creatures (minimum 1); a chosen creature automatically succeeds on that save.

name: Distant Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you cast a spell with range 5 feet or greater, double the range. When you cast a spell with range Touch, make the range 30 feet instead.

name: Empowered Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you roll damage for a spell, reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1). You must use the new rolls. You can use this with another Metamagic option on the same spell.

name: Extended Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you cast a spell with duration 1 minute or longer, double its duration, to a maximum duration of 24 hours.

name: Heightened Spell
desc: Cost: 3 sorcery points. When you cast a spell that forces a creature to make a saving throw, give one target of the spell disadvantage on its first saving throw against that spell.

name: Quickened Spell
desc: Cost: 2 sorcery points. When you cast a spell with casting time of 1 action, change it to a casting time of 1 bonus action for this casting.

name: Subtle Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you cast a spell, cast it without somatic or verbal components.

name: Twinned Spell
desc: Cost: sorcery points equal to the spell's level (1 point for a cantrip). When you cast a spell that targets only one creature and does not have range Self, target a second creature in range with the same spell.

name: Transmuted Spell
desc: Cost: 1 sorcery point. When you cast a spell that deals acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder damage, change that damage type to one of the other listed types for that casting.

name: Seeking Spell
desc: Cost: 2 sorcery points. When you make a spell attack roll and miss, reroll the d20. You must use the new roll. You can use Seeking Spell even if you have already used another Metamagic option during the casting.
